_source: BCU util/Data.java Proc.REVIVE @Order layout: count(0)/time(1)/health(2)/dis_0(3)/dis_1(4)/type(5){range_type,imu_zkill,revive_non_zombie,revive_others}. The normal unit/enemy CSV revive holder carries only count/time/health; dis_0/dis_1 and the type bits (extra/custom 'revive others' + range) live on the per-attack / body proc object.
